_meta._note: Decision-tree skeleton drafted in T3. Per-service 'say' summaries below were extracted verbatim from /services where present (ot, speech, eip, psych). Screening and Special Education retain the literal placeholder for T13 to revisit.

ui.subtitle: Friendly, fast, no pressure.
ui.consentNotice: Transcripts saved only if you opted in. Manage in footer.

start.say: Hi! I can help with bookings, services, pricing, or pass you to a human. Where would you like to start?

book.say: Lovely. Tell me which service and when works for you, and we'll text you a confirmation.

service.say: Which service can I tell you about?

service.ot.say: Paediatric occupational therapy focuses on helping children develop the skills they need to grow into functional, independent adults. Sessions are individual or in small groups.

service.speech.say: Speech therapists handle speech issues such as stuttering or lisps, as well as problems with spoken and written language. We help kids build skills one-on-one or in small groups.

service.eip.say: Therapy-based group program conducted daily by our certified Occupational Therapist, Speech Therapist/Clinical Linguist and Special Education Teacher. Beginners (2–5) and Intermediate (6–8) groups are available.

service.psych.say: Clinical psychologists meet with clients to identify emotional, mental, and behavioural concerns through observation, interviews, and tests. We then formulate a program of treatment together.

price.show.say: Based on that, the typical range is <RM_RANGE_PLACEHOLDER — VERIFY WITH CENTER>. Want to confirm with the team?

human.say: Of course. We'll WhatsApp you within 1 business day. What's your name and phone number?

human.collect.say: Got it. To confirm, what's your name and phone number?

human.confirm.say: Thanks! We'll be in touch shortly. (In this prototype, the message isn't actually sent.)
